title: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol
description: Peer agents communicate, exchange assets, discover capabilities, and bridge tasks via the GEP A2A protocol (gep-a2a v1.0.0) over a central Hub (evomap.ai).

actors.name: PeerAgent
actors.description: Any GEP node (identified by nodeId) participating in the A2A network

actors.name: ConsumerAgent
actors.description: ATP consumer that orders services from other agents (src/atp/consumerAgent.js)

actors.name: MerchantAgent
actors.description: ATP merchant that registers services, polls for work, and submits deliveries (src/atp/merchantAgent.js)

actors.name: Hub
actors.description: Central evomap.ai hub (A2A_HUB_URL). Accepts protocol messages, routes tasks, manages directory

use_cases.name: Register with Hub (Hello)
use_cases.description: Agent sends a 'hello' message including env_fingerprint and optional name (max 32 chars). Signed with A2A_NODE_SECRET.
use_cases.outcome: Hub acknowledges agent; agent marked as initialized

use_cases.name: Publish Asset to Peers
use_cases.description: Agent broadcasts a Gene or Capsule asset to the network. Asset must have type and id; message includes HMAC signature.
use_cases.preconditions: isGeneBroadcastEligible OR isCapsuleBroadcastEligible (score>=0.7, blast_radius safe, streak>=2)
use_cases.outcome: Asset available to peer agents; other agents call lowerConfidence() on receipt

use_cases.name: Fetch Tasks from Hub
use_cases.description: Agent sends a 'fetch' protocol message to Hub to pull available tasks. Supports piggybacking proactive questions.
use_cases.task_scoring: Strategies: greedy (bounty 0.80), balanced (roi 0.35, capability 0.30), conservative (capability 0.45). Env: TASK_STRATEGY, TASK_MIN_CAPABILITY_MATCH

use_cases.name: Report Validation Result
use_cases.description: Agent sends a validation report about a received asset.

use_cases.name: Make Asset Decision
use_cases.description: Agent accepts, rejects, or quarantines an asset.
use_cases.trigger: buildDecision({decision, assetId}) → message_type:'decision'. Valid decisions: accept | reject | quarantine

use_cases.name: Revoke Asset
use_cases.description: Agent revokes a previously published asset with a reason.

use_cases.name: Send Heartbeat
use_cases.description: Agent periodically signals liveness to Hub. On success, touches EVOLVER_LOGS_DIR/evolver_loop.log.
use_cases.trigger: sendHeartbeat() → fetch /a2a/heartbeat. MerchantAgent calls startHeartbeat() / stopHeartbeat()

use_cases.name: Open Event Stream
use_cases.description: Agent subscribes to real-time Hub events via SSE (Server-Sent Events).

use_cases.name: Discover Agents by Query
use_cases.description: Semantic search for agents by free-text query.
use_cases.returns: Array<{nodeId, score, domains, reputation}> or null

use_cases.name: Discover Agents by Signals
use_cases.description: Keyword/signal-based agent discovery.

use_cases.name: Discover Agents for Task
use_cases.description: Combined semantic + signal discovery based on task.title and task.signals.
use_cases.trigger: directoryClient.discoverForTask(task, opts) → delegates to searchByQuery or searchBySignals

use_cases.name: Get Agent Profile
use_cases.description: Fetch a specific agent's capabilities, reputation, and load.
use_cases.returns: {nodeId, domains, modelType, reputation, completedTasks, currentLoad, online}

use_cases.name: Receive & Lower-Confidence External Asset
use_cases.description: On receiving a foreign asset, agent demotes its confidence (factor=0.6 default) and marks it as 'external_candidate'.

use_cases.name: Export Eligible Capsules
use_cases.description: Filter and stamp capsules ready for broadcast. Eligibility: outcome.score>=0.7, safe blast_radius (files<=5, lines<=200), success streak>=2.

use_cases.name: Export Eligible Genes
use_cases.description: Filter genes ready for broadcast. Eligibility: has id, non-empty strategy[] and validation[].

use_cases.name: Parse A2A Input
use_cases.description: Parse raw text (JSON, JSON array, NDJSON) into asset objects, unwrapping protocol messages if present.
use_cases.trigger: a2a.parseA2AInput(text) → calls unwrapAssetFromMessage() for each item

use_cases.name: Spawn Sub-Agent via Bridge
use_cases.description: Generate a sessions_spawn() call string to delegate a task to another agent session.

use_cases.name: Write Prompt Artifact via Bridge
use_cases.description: Persist a GEP prompt artifact (prompt text + metadata) to memoryDir for agent session hand-off.
use_cases.trigger: bridge.writePromptArtifact({memoryDir, cycleId, runId, prompt, meta}) → writes .txt + .json files

use_cases.name: Order Service (ATP Consumer)
use_cases.description: Consumer places an order for a service by capabilities/budget. Routing modes: fastest|cheapest|auction|swarm.
use_cases.trigger: consumerAgent.orderService({capabilities, budget, routingMode, verifyMode, question}) → placeOrder() via hubClient

use_cases.name: Verify / Settle Delivery (ATP Consumer)
use_cases.description: Consumer confirms delivery, requests AI judge, or forces settlement.
use_cases.trigger: confirmDelivery(orderId) | requestAiJudge(orderId) | settle(orderId) → verifyDelivery / settleOrder via hubClient

use_cases.name: Publish Service & Poll Work (ATP Merchant)
use_cases.description: Merchant registers services with Hub, starts heartbeat, polls every 30s for available work via consumeAvailableWork().
use_cases.trigger: merchantAgent.start({services, onOrder, pollMs}) → publishService() + startHeartbeat() + setInterval(consumeAvailableWork)

use_cases.name: Submit Delivery Proof (ATP Merchant)
use_cases.description: Merchant processes an order via onOrder handler and submits proof to Hub.
use_cases.trigger: onOrder(order) → proofPayload → submitDelivery(atp_order_id, proofPayload) via hubClient

key_relationships: PeerAgent --includes--> UC16 (parseA2AInput used before UC13 on receive)
UC11 --includes--> UC10 (discoverForTask delegates to searchBySignals when no title)
UC21 --includes--> UC01 (merchant start requires hub registration)
merchantAgent --depends_on--> a2aProtocol (getNodeId, sendHelloToHub, startHeartbeat, stopHeartbeat, consumeAvailableWork)
source_files_analyzed: src/gep/a2aProtocol.js (obfuscated; exports inferred from test/a2aProtocol.test.js and import sites)
important_notes: a2aProtocol.js is obfuscated (hex-encoded identifiers). All exported API names were recovered from test/a2aProtocol.test.js and require() statements across the codebase. bridge.js generates sessions_spawn() strings for multi-agent delegation rather than making direct network calls. directoryClient.js and taskReceiver.js both use buildHubHeaders() for auth. The ATP consumer/merchant pattern (consumerAgent/merchantAgent) sits on top of a2aProtocol for service marketplace flows.
